personal.name: Mohammad Hammad Sarfraz
personal.title: Software Engineer (Backend)
personal.bio: Software Engineer with backend-focused experience in Django and data pipelines. Experienced in building REST APIs, asynchronous Celery workflows, ETL/data processing pipelines, and AI-assisted content pipelines while collaborating with technical and business stakeholders.

responsibilities: Restored a broken staging-to-production data pipeline
Implemented backward-compatible manual Django migrations for business transitions
Owned the Grand Quiz module for the teacher-training app and Retool app in Django
Built complex sync GET endpoints and multiple RESTful APIs with offline-first support
Investigated Redis usage spikes and implemented fixes
Created AI-powered feedback and question-generation pipelines based on user answers and stakeholder metadata
Integrated and debugged new Retool apps and features
Developed a signal-driven Celery worker pipeline for asynchronous processing
Collaborated with stakeholders and contributed to code reviews
Built ETL scripts for data preprocessing and pipeline optimization
Performed exploratory data analysis and API-compliant data parsing
Created visualizations for analytics and stakeholder reporting
Automated testing with Selenium and captured JSON for validation
Analyzed datasets for the Prime Minister Youth Program to extract insights and support program evaluation
Performed Selenium-based automation testing on chatbots and websites to ensure reliability and user experience

projects.name: ShopEase (SaaS Application)
projects.description: A SaaS application that provides an AI chatbot for e-commerce stores to assist with order tracking, product search, and product recommendations.
highlights: Built an AI-powered chatbot solution for multi-store e-commerce use cases
Supported key customer journeys including order tracking and product discovery
Designed as a SaaS-oriented application for reusable deployment

education.details: Relevant coursework: Data Mining, Deep Learning, Data Warehousing & Business Intelligence, Data Analysis & Visualization, Agentic AI
